roadmap.title: Python for ML
roadmap.explanation: Be comfortable with Python, data handling, and basic algorithms.

roadmap.title: Machine learning foundations
roadmap.explanation: Learn model training workflow, evaluation, and classical ML techniques.

roadmap.title: Deep learning
roadmap.explanation: Learn neural networks, backprop, CNNs/RNNs/Transformers at a high level.

roadmap.title: NLP fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Learn embeddings, tokenization, transformers, and evaluation basics.

roadmap.title: Deployment for AI
roadmap.explanation: Learn packaging, APIs, model serving, monitoring, and simple CI/CD.

roadmap.title: Programming and HTTP basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn a backend language well and understand how HTTP requests and responses work.

roadmap.title: API design
roadmap.explanation: Practice building REST endpoints, validation, and error handling.

roadmap.title: Databases
roadmap.explanation: Understand relational modeling, queries, indexing, and basic schema design.

roadmap.title: Authentication and security
roadmap.explanation: Learn sessions, tokens, password hashing, and secure API practices.

roadmap.title: Deployment and operations
roadmap.explanation: Deploy a backend service and learn logs, env vars, and monitoring basics.

roadmap.title: Linux and command line
roadmap.explanation: Get comfortable with files, processes, permissions, and shell scripting.

roadmap.title: Networking basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn IPs, DNS, load balancing, and how services communicate.

roadmap.title: Cloud foundations
roadmap.explanation: Understand compute, storage, IAM, and managed services on a major cloud.

roadmap.title: Infrastructure as Code
roadmap.explanation: Use Terraform or similar tools to define and version your infrastructure.

roadmap.title: Cloud security
roadmap.explanation: Learn least privilege, secrets handling, and secure cloud configuration.

roadmap.title: Networking and operating systems
roadmap.explanation: Learn how systems communicate and how common operating systems behave.

roadmap.title: Security fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Cover common attack types, defensive controls, and security best practices.

roadmap.title: Threat detection basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn log analysis, indicators of compromise, and incident triage basics.

roadmap.title: Scripting for automation
roadmap.explanation: Use Python or shell scripts to automate repetitive security tasks.

roadmap.title: Hands-on labs
roadmap.explanation: Practice with safe labs and simulated incidents to build confidence.

roadmap.title: Spreadsheet and SQL basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn cleaning, formulas, joins, filters, and summary reporting.

roadmap.title: Python for analysis
roadmap.explanation: Use Python for data cleaning, transformation, and exploratory analysis.

roadmap.title: Statistics for decision making
roadmap.explanation: Cover averages, distributions, significance, and basic experimentation.

roadmap.title: Data storytelling
roadmap.explanation: Turn findings into clear visual explanations for non-technical audiences.

roadmap.title: Portfolio dashboards
roadmap.explanation: Build a few dashboard or reporting projects that show business impact.

roadmap.title: Python and SQL foundations
roadmap.explanation: Get strong at scripting, querying, and manipulating structured data.

roadmap.title: ETL pipelines
roadmap.explanation: Learn how to ingest, transform, validate, and move data reliably.

roadmap.title: Data modeling and warehousing
roadmap.explanation: Understand dimensional modeling and analytics-friendly warehouse design.

roadmap.title: Cloud data services
roadmap.explanation: Use managed storage, compute, and orchestration tools in the cloud.

roadmap.title: Reliability and monitoring
roadmap.explanation: Add observability, retries, and data quality checks to pipelines.

roadmap.title: Python for data work
roadmap.explanation: Focus on Python basics, data types, functions, and working with notebooks.

roadmap.title: SQL fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Learn SELECT, JOINs, aggregations, and basic window functions.

roadmap.title: Statistics fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Cover descriptive statistics, probability, hypothesis testing, and confidence intervals.

roadmap.title: Data visualization
roadmap.explanation: Learn how to communicate insights with clear charts and narrative.

roadmap.title: Machine learning basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn supervised/unsupervised learning, model evaluation, and common algorithms.

roadmap.title: Linux and shell basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn process management, filesystems, permissions, and shell scripting.

roadmap.title: Networking foundations
roadmap.explanation: Understand ports, DNS, proxies, TLS, and how services talk to each other.

roadmap.title: Containers and Docker
roadmap.explanation: Package apps in containers and learn images, volumes, and Compose basics.

roadmap.title: CI/CD automation
roadmap.explanation: Automate testing, builds, and deployments with repeatable pipelines.

roadmap.title: Kubernetes and cloud operations
roadmap.explanation: Learn orchestration, scaling, and deployment strategies on cloud infrastructure.

roadmap.title: Semantic HTML
roadmap.explanation: Build pages with clean structure and meaningful semantic elements.

roadmap.title: Modern CSS
roadmap.explanation: Learn layout, spacing, responsive design, and reusable styling patterns.

roadmap.title: JavaScript essentials
roadmap.explanation: Master the language fundamentals that power web interfaces.

roadmap.title: React application development
roadmap.explanation: Build component-based interfaces with state, effects, and routing.

roadmap.title: Accessibility and polish
roadmap.explanation: Learn keyboard support, semantics, contrast, and inclusive UI best practices.

roadmap.title: Frontend fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Build strong web basics before moving into frameworks and backend systems.

roadmap.title: React and app architecture
roadmap.explanation: Learn components, state, routing, and reusable UI patterns.

roadmap.title: API development
roadmap.explanation: Learn request handling, validation, authentication, and error management.

roadmap.title: Database fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Use relational databases and understand modeling, querying, and persistence.

roadmap.title: Deployment and production basics
roadmap.explanation: Ship a full app and learn environment config, monitoring, and debugging.

roadmap.title: Programming foundations
roadmap.explanation: Build strong logic, control flow, and debugging fundamentals first.

roadmap.title: Game engine workflow
roadmap.explanation: Learn scenes, objects, input, physics, and scripting in a popular engine.

roadmap.title: Math and movement
roadmap.explanation: Understand vectors, transforms, and collision-related math concepts.

roadmap.title: 3D and asset pipeline
roadmap.explanation: Learn basic rendering, lighting, animation, and asset import workflow.

roadmap.title: Performance optimization
roadmap.explanation: Profile and optimize frame rate, memory, and loading behavior.

roadmap.title: Python and data fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Learn Python well enough to manipulate data and build ML experiments.

roadmap.title: Classical machine learning
roadmap.explanation: Understand the training workflow, evaluation, and common models.

roadmap.title: Deep learning basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn neural networks and practical model development with a modern framework.

roadmap.title: MLOps practices
roadmap.explanation: Version data/models, track experiments, and make ML systems reproducible.

roadmap.title: Model deployment
roadmap.explanation: Serve models behind APIs and learn monitoring and rollout basics.

roadmap.title: Programming and UI basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn core language fundamentals and mobile-first UI patterns.

roadmap.title: React Native fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Build screens, navigation, and stateful mobile experiences.

roadmap.title: Working with APIs
roadmap.explanation: Fetch remote data, handle loading states, and manage offline concerns.

roadmap.title: Device features
roadmap.explanation: Integrate storage, camera, notifications, and platform-specific UX.

roadmap.title: Store deployment
roadmap.explanation: Prepare builds, signing, testing, and release processes for app stores.

roadmap.title: Product thinking
roadmap.explanation: Learn how to identify user pain points and evaluate solution quality.

roadmap.title: User research
roadmap.explanation: Practice interviews, surveys, and turning insights into decisions.

roadmap.title: Roadmapping and prioritization
roadmap.explanation: Learn how to define scope, sequence work, and communicate trade-offs.

roadmap.title: Analytics and experimentation
roadmap.explanation: Use metrics and experiments to understand outcomes and improve products.

roadmap.title: Stakeholder communication
roadmap.explanation: Write clearly, align teams, and present product decisions effectively.

roadmap.title: Testing fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Understand test types, bug reporting, and quality planning basics.

roadmap.title: Programming for automation
roadmap.explanation: Learn enough code to write repeatable automated tests and helpers.

roadmap.title: API testing
roadmap.explanation: Validate requests, auth, schemas, and edge cases in backend APIs.

roadmap.title: UI automation
roadmap.explanation: Automate critical user flows with a modern browser automation framework.

roadmap.title: Quality in CI/CD
roadmap.explanation: Run tests in pipelines and learn how to keep feedback fast and reliable.

roadmap.title: Systems and Linux
roadmap.explanation: Learn how services run, fail, and recover on real systems.

roadmap.title: Networking under load
roadmap.explanation: Understand latency, retries, DNS, TLS, and service communication patterns.

roadmap.title: Observability
roadmap.explanation: Work with logs, metrics, traces, and service health indicators.

roadmap.title: Automation
roadmap.explanation: Automate repetitive operations and operational guardrails.

roadmap.title: Incident response
roadmap.explanation: Practice triage, postmortems, and improving reliability after failures.

roadmap.title: Design fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Learn hierarchy, layout, color, typography, and visual consistency.

roadmap.title: Wireframing and flows
roadmap.explanation: Map user journeys and create low-fidelity concepts before polishing visuals.

roadmap.title: Interactive prototyping
roadmap.explanation: Turn ideas into clickable experiences that can be tested quickly.

roadmap.title: User research
roadmap.explanation: Gather feedback and convert qualitative insights into design decisions.

roadmap.title: Design systems
roadmap.explanation: Create reusable patterns, tokens, and components for scalable design work.

roadmap.title: HTML foundations
roadmap.explanation: Learn semantic markup and accessible document structure.

roadmap.title: CSS fundamentals
roadmap.explanation: Master layout (Flexbox/Grid), responsive design, and modern styling.

roadmap.title: JavaScript essentials
roadmap.explanation: Learn core JS, async/await, DOM basics, and tooling concepts.

roadmap.title: React core
roadmap.explanation: Learn components, state, effects, routing, and data fetching patterns.

roadmap.title: Backend basics
roadmap.explanation: Learn REST, HTTP, authentication basics, databases, and deployment fundamentals.
